summary: Phase 1 Frontend Architecture Refactoring - All Tests PASSED. App.js reduced from 598 to 189 lines. Routes split into 6 domain modules (admin, agency, b2b, core, hotel, public). Design system with 7 pattern components verified. Login, sidebar navigation, and all route modules working correctly.

issues: Shows 'Otel listesi yüklenemedi - Yetki yok' error - API authorization issue for hotel list, not a routing issue
Shows 'Tenant context bulunamadı' warning - expected for super_admin context, not a routing issue

critical_code_review_comments: App.js successfully refactored from 598 lines to 189 lines

Route modules correctly split into 6 domain files: adminRoutes.jsx (219 lines), coreRoutes.jsx (109 lines), publicRoutes.jsx (65 lines), agencyRoutes.jsx (50 lines), hotelRoutes.jsx (26 lines), b2bRoutes.jsx (19 lines)
All routes use React.lazy() for code splitting with Suspense fallback
Design system patterns implemented: DataTable, PageShell, FilterBar, StatusBadge, ConfirmDialog, Timeline, EmptyState
All components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
TanStack Query integration present in /features/ directory with API layers and hooks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 frontend architecture refactoring complete and verified. App.js split into domain-based route modules. All routes resolve correctly. Design system with 7 pattern components (DataTable, PageShell, FilterBar, StatusBadge, ConfirmDialog, Timeline, EmptyState) verified to exist. Features directory has API layers and TanStack Query hooks for analytics, auth, bookings, crm, dashboard, finance, governance, inventory, operations. Some 400 errors in console are expected due to backend state (Redis unavailable, tenant context issues) - not related to routing changes.

public_routes.login (/login): PASS - Login form present, authentication works
public_routes.pricing (/pricing): PASS - Pricing page loads with Syroce packages

admin_routes.inventory-sync (/app/admin/inventory-syn: PASS - Inventory Sync Engine dashboard loads with supplier health

agency_routes.hotels (/app/agency/hotels): PASS - Route loads (shows authorization error for hotel list - expected)
